Good Health and Well-being.reason: The syllabus does not contain any information or activities related to health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course directly contributes to quality education by developing language proficiency, cultural knowledge, and an international perspective, aligning strongly with Target 4.7 (cultural diversity, global citizenship) and Target 4.4 (relevant skills).

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not address energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency in any capacity.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: While language skills can indirectly aid employment, the course does not explicitly focus on economic growth, decent work, entrepreneurship, or labor rights as per SDG 8 targets.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Merely mentioning cultural landmarks like the Hanoi Opera House or Sai Gon Central Post Office as cultural notes does not contribute to developing resilient infrastructure or industrial innovation as defined by SDG 9 targets.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course does not address income inequality, social inclusion, discriminatory practices, or migration policies, which are the core focus of SDG 10.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The syllabus does not contain any content related to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, waste reduction, or sustainable production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: There is no mention of climate change, environmental hazards, or related policies in the course description or weekly topics.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content does not include any topics related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable use of marine resources.

Life on Land.reason: The syllabus does not contain any information related to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.
